'''Capo''' was a [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] [[Gender/Legends|male]]. He was a [[Peace Brigade]]r disguised as one of the [[New Republic Intelligence Service|NRI]] guards covertly stationed aboard ''[[Queen of Empire]]'' to watch over [[Elan]] and [[Vergere]] to oversee their transfer from [[Myrkr/Legends|Myrkr]] to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. He was shot by [[Showolter]] but escaped from the cabin alive. He was later [[Death/Legends|killed]] by Elan's [[bo'tous spore]]s.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos I: Hero's Trial]]'' {{1st}}
